info.title: Auto Forex Trader API
info.description:
Auto Forex Trader Backend API.

## Authentication
Most endpoints require JWT authentication. Include the token in the `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header.

## Rate Limiting
Authentication endpoints are rate-limited to prevent abuse.

post.description: Handle user login.
Invalidate JWT token and terminate user sessions.
Exchange the HTTP-only refresh-token cookie for a new access + refresh cookie pair.
Handle user registration.
Resend verification email.
Verify user email with token.

get.description: List notifications for the authenticated user.

post.description: Mark a single notification as read.
Mark all unread notifications as read.

get.description: Get user settings.
Get public account settings (registration/login enabled flags).
System health check endpoint.

API endpoint for OANDA accounts.

GET /api/market/accounts/
- List all OANDA accounts for the authenticated user

POST /api/market/accounts/
- Add a new OANDA account

post.description:
API endpoint for OANDA accounts.

GET /api/market/accounts/
- List all OANDA accounts for the authenticated user

POST /api/market/accounts/
- Add a new OANDA account

get.description:
API endpoint for retrieving, updating, and deleting a specific OANDA account.

GET /api/market/accounts/{id}/
- Retrieve details of a specific OANDA account

PUT /api/market/accounts/{id}/
- Update a specific OANDA account

DELETE /api/market/accounts/{id}/
- Delete a specific OANDA account

put.description:
API endpoint for retrieving, updating, and deleting a specific OANDA account.

GET /api/market/accounts/{id}/
- Retrieve details of a specific OANDA account

PUT /api/market/accounts/{id}/
- Update a specific OANDA account

DELETE /api/market/accounts/{id}/
- Delete a specific OANDA account

delete.description:
API endpoint for retrieving, updating, and deleting a specific OANDA account.

GET /api/market/accounts/{id}/
- Retrieve details of a specific OANDA account

PUT /api/market/accounts/{id}/
- Update a specific OANDA account

DELETE /api/market/accounts/{id}/
- Delete a specific OANDA account

post.description: Queue a refresh for a cached OANDA account snapshot.

get.description: Return the status for the latest cached OANDA account snapshot refresh.
Fetch historical candle data from OANDA.
Retrieve supported OANDA granularities/timeframes.
Get latest persisted OANDA API health status.

post.description: Perform a live OANDA API health check.

get.description: Retrieve list of supported currency pairs from OANDA.
Get detailed information about a specific currency pair.
Get current forex market open/close status and active sessions.
List user's orders from OANDA API.

post.description: Submit a new order (market, limit, stop, OCO).

get.description: Retrieve order details from OANDA API.

delete.description: Cancel a pending order via OANDA API.

get.description: Retrieve positions directly from OANDA API.

put.description: Open a new position by submitting a market order via OANDA.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific trade/position from OANDA.

patch.description: Close a position via OANDA API.

get.description: Fetch historical tick data from DB with cursor-based pagination.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor returned by previous response for pagination

get.description: Get available date range of tick data per instrument.

Resolve a conversion multiplier between two currencies. Direct same-currency rates do not require market data; base/quote conversions use the supplied instrument mid price first, then fall back to stored tick data and common two-leg cross rates.
Get broker-read outage parking and OANDA retry counters.
Read-only list of automatic task recovery audit records.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

get.description: API endpoint for listing all available trading strategies.
Get default parameters for a strategy.
List and create strategy configurations.

post.description: List and create strategy configurations.

get.description: Retrieve, update, and delete a strategy configuration.

put.description: Retrieve, update, and delete a strategy configuration.

patch.description: Retrieve, update, and delete a strategy configuration.

delete.description: Retrieve, update, and delete a strategy configuration.

post.description: Copy a strategy configuration with optional new name and description.

get.description: List tasks using a strategy configuration.
ViewSet for BacktestTask operations with task-centric API.

post.description: Set the current balance for a paused or stopped backtest execution.
Create a copy of the task with a new name.

get.description: Retrieve paginated task events.

parameters.name: created_from
parameters.description: Filter events created at or after this RFC3339 timestamp.

parameters.name: created_to
parameters.description: Filter events created at or before this RFC3339 timestamp.

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix with '-' for descending.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description:
Event scope filter.

* `all` - all
* `trading` - trading
* `task` - task

get.description: Retrieve execution history for a task.
Retrieve a single execution record for a task.

schema.description: UUID identifying the current execution run

delete.description: Delete execution records for a task.

schema.description: UUID identifying the current execution run
UUID identifying the current execution run

get.description: Return distinct logger/component names for a task's logs.
Retrieve paginated task logs.

parameters.name: message_match
parameters.description:
Message filter match mode: partial, exact, or regex.

* `partial` - partial
* `exact` - exact
* `regex` - regex

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix with '-' for descending.

parameters.name: timestamp_from
parameters.description: Filter records from this RFC3339 timestamp (inclusive).

parameters.name: timestamp_to
parameters.description: Filter records until this RFC3339 timestamp (inclusive).

get.description: Retrieve paginated task orders.

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix with '-' for descending.

parameters.name: timestamp_from
parameters.description: Filter records from this RFC3339 timestamp (inclusive).

parameters.name: timestamp_to
parameters.description: Filter records until this RFC3339 timestamp (inclusive).

post.description: Pause a running task.

get.description: Retrieve the full lifecycle chain for one position, including rebuild links.
Retrieve paginated task positions.

parameters.name: include_trade_ids
parameters.description: Include position trade_ids in the response.

parameters.name: initial_position_filter
parameters.description:
Filter positions by initial-position seed marker.

* `all` - all
* `initial` - initial
* `normal` - normal

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix with '-' for descending.

parameters.name: range_from
parameters.description: RFC3339 lower bound for positions overlapping a chart range.

parameters.name: range_to
parameters.description: RFC3339 upper bound for positions overlapping a chart range.

post.description: Restart a task from the beginning.
Resume a paused task.
Submit task for execution.
Stop running task asynchronously.

get.description: Retrieve strategy cycles built from Trade.cycle_id. When ``cycle_id`` is omitted, returns a paginated list of cycle aggregates (no per-cycle trade ledger).  When ``cycle_id`` is supplied, returns a single cycle aggregate.  Pass ``include_trades=true`` only when the full trade ledger is needed; ordinary detail views should use the paginated trades endpoint.

parameters.name: cycle_sort
parameters.description:
Cycle ordering by started_at. 'asc' for oldest first (default), 'desc' for newest.

* `asc` - asc
* `desc` - desc

parameters.name: cycle_status
parameters.description:
Filter cycles by status.

* `all` - all
* `active` - active
* `completed` - completed
* `pending` - pending

parameters.name: include_trades
parameters.description: Include the full trade ledger in strategy cycle detail responses. Use the paginated trades endpoint for ordinary detail rendering.

parameters.name: trade_id
parameters.description: Filter cycles containing a trade whose id starts with this value.

get.description: Retrieve paginated strategy calculations, actions, and operation history.
List loss-cut trades for an execution. Used by chart overlays to draw vertical reference lines marking each forced liquidation with the units closed.
Retrieve paginated strategy metrics aligned to OHLC chart granularity.
Retrieve the latest strategy metric snapshot without full pagination counts.
Retrieve SnowballNet OHLC, average-price lines, metrics, and markers.
Retrieve the current strategy snapshot for a task execution.
Retrieve structured task summary including PnL, trade/position counts, execution state, tick info, and task status.
Retrieve paginated task trades.

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Trade ordering field. Prefix with '-' for descending. Legacy values 'asc' and 'desc' are accepted for timestamp ordering.

parameters.name: timestamp_from
parameters.description: Filter trades executed at or after this RFC3339 timestamp.

parameters.name: timestamp_to
parameters.description: Filter trades executed at or before this RFC3339 timestamp.

parameters.name: trade_kind
parameters.description:
Filter trades by lifecycle kind: all, order, or close.

* `all` - all
* `order` - order
* `close` - close

get.description: Return tasks whose current state can seed initial positions.

post.description: Import editable initial-position cycles from OANDA open trades.
Import editable initial-position cycles from another task.

BacktestBalanceAdjustmentRequest.description: Request serializer for changing a resumable backtest execution balance.

current_balance.description: New current balance for the paused or stopped backtest execution.

reason.description: Optional audit note for the balance change.

BacktestBalanceAdjustmentResponse.description: Response serializer for backtest balance changes.

data_source.description:
Data source for historical tick data

* `postgresql` - PostgreSQL
* `athena` - AWS Athena
* `s3` - AWS S3

pip_size.description: Pip size for the instrument (e.g., 0.0001 for EUR_USD, 0.01 for USD_JPY). If not provided, will be fetched from OANDA account.

hedging_enabled.description: Allow simultaneous long and short positions (hedging) during backtest.

tick_granularity.description:
Tick replay granularity for backtests. Use 'tick' for full tick-by-tick replay, or a time bucket such as '1s' or '1m'.

* `tick` - All Ticks
* `1s` - 1 Second
* `10s` - 10 Seconds
* `15s` - 15 Seconds
* `30s` - 30 Seconds
* `1m` - 1 Minute
* `5m` - 5 Minutes
* `15m` - 15 Minutes
* `30m` - 30 Minutes
* `1h` - 1 Hour

tick_window_value_mode.description:
Representative value to use when replay granularity is aggregated. Ignored when tick_granularity='tick'.

* `first` - First Tick
* `last` - Last Tick
* `average` - Average
* `median` - Median

drain_duration_hours.description: Maximum duration in hours for drain-on-stop before forcing a stop. Set to 0 to wait indefinitely for positions to reach breakeven.

market_idle_pre_close_minutes.description: Switch to IDLE this many minutes before the market closes. 0 disables pre-close idling.

market_idle_resume_delay_minutes.description: Wait this many minutes after the market reopens before resuming trading. 0 disables the resume delay.

market_close_enabled.description: Apply a weekly market-close window during the backtest. When disabled, market-idle thresholds are ignored.

market_close_weekday.description: Weekday the market closes (0 = Monday, 6 = Sunday). Default: 4 (Friday).

market_close_hour_utc.description: Hour (UTC) at which the market closes on close weekday. 0–23.

market_open_weekday.description: Weekday the market reopens (0 = Monday, 6 = Sunday). Default: 6 (Sunday).

market_open_hour_utc.description: Hour (UTC) at which the market reopens on open weekday. 0–23.

max_tick_gap_hours.description: Maximum forward gap between replayed ticks, in hours, before the backtest is failed as suspicious. Default: 120 (5 days).

initial_positions_enabled.description: Create Snowball initial cycles/positions before starting the backtest.

initial_position_cycles.description: Requested Snowball initial cycle/position structure. Positions, trades, orders, and strategy state are generated from this data.

sell_on_stop.description: Close all positions when the task is stopped

status.description:
Current task status

* `created` - Created
* `starting` - Starting
* `running` - Running
* `paused` - Paused
* `idle` - Idle
* `draining` - Draining
* `stopping` - Stopping
* `stopped` - Stopped
* `completed` - Completed
* `failed` - Failed

execution_id.description: UUID identifying the current execution run

started_at.description: Timestamp when the task execution started

completed_at.description: Timestamp when the task execution completed

error_message.description: Return a fixed public failure message without internal details.

error_code.description: Return the stable public failure code.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this record was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when this record was last updated

can_resume.description: Check if task can be resumed with state recovery.

BacktestTaskCreateRequest.description: Serializer for creating and updating BacktestTask.

config.description: Strategy configuration used by this task

data_source.description:
Data source for historical tick data

* `postgresql` - PostgreSQL
* `athena` - AWS Athena
* `s3` - AWS S3

display_currency.description: Preferred currency for displaying balances and PnL. Empty uses account currency.

pip_size.description: Pip size for the instrument (e.g., 0.0001 for EUR_USD, 0.01 for USD_JPY). If not provided, will be fetched from OANDA account.

hedging_enabled.description: Allow simultaneous long and short positions (hedging) during backtest.

tick_granularity.description:
Tick replay granularity for backtests. Use 'tick' for full tick-by-tick replay, or a time bucket such as '1s' or '1m'.

* `tick` - All Ticks
* `1s` - 1 Second
* `10s` - 10 Seconds
* `15s` - 15 Seconds
* `30s` - 30 Seconds
* `1m` - 1 Minute
* `5m` - 5 Minutes
* `15m` - 15 Minutes
* `30m` - 30 Minutes
* `1h` - 1 Hour

market_idle_pre_close_minutes.description: Switch to IDLE this many minutes before the market closes. 0 disables pre-close idling.

market_idle_resume_delay_minutes.description: Wait this many minutes after the market reopens before resuming trading. 0 disables the resume delay.

market_close_enabled.description: Apply a weekly market-close window during the backtest. When disabled, market-idle thresholds are ignored.

market_close_weekday.description: Weekday the market closes (0 = Monday, 6 = Sunday). Default: 4 (Friday).

market_close_hour_utc.description: Hour (UTC) at which the market closes on close weekday. 0–23.

market_open_weekday.description: Weekday the market reopens (0 = Monday, 6 = Sunday). Default: 6 (Sunday).

market_open_hour_utc.description: Hour (UTC) at which the market reopens on open weekday. 0–23.

max_tick_gap_hours.description: Maximum forward gap between replayed ticks, in hours, before the backtest is failed as suspicious. Default: 120 (5 days).

initial_positions_enabled.description: Create Snowball initial cycles/positions before starting the backtest.

initial_position_cycles.description: Requested Snowball initial cycle/position structure. Positions, trades, orders, and strategy state are generated from this data.

sell_on_stop.description: Close all positions when the task is stopped

BacktestTaskList.description:
Serializer for BacktestTask list view (summary only).

Inherits all fields from BacktestTaskSerializer but drops
commission details and ``execution_id``, and marks everything read-only.

EventTypeEnum.description:
* `tick_received` - Tick Received
* `strategy_signal` - Strategy Signal
* `trade_executed` - Trade Executed
* `status_changed` - Status Changed
* `error_occurred` - Error Occurred
* `initial_entry` - Initial Entry
* `retracement` - Retracement
* `take_profit` - Take Profit
* `open_position` - Open Position
* `close_position` - Close Position
* `rebuild_position` - Rebuild Position
* `add_layer` - Add Layer
* `remove_layer` - Remove Layer
* `volatility_lock` - Volatility Lock
* `volatility_hedge_neutralize` - Volatility Hedge Neutralize
* `margin_protection` - Margin Protection
* `strategy_started` - Strategy Started
* `strategy_paused` - Strategy Paused
* `strategy_resumed` - Strategy Resumed
* `strategy_stopped` - Strategy Stopped

FxRateResponse.description: Response for a resolved FX conversion rate.

InitialPositionImportFromOandaRequest.description: Request serializer for importing from OANDA open trades.

InitialPositionImportFromTaskRequest.description: Request serializer for importing from another task.

InitialPositionImportResult.description: Serializer for imported editable initial-position cycles.

InitialPositionImportSource.description: Serializer for a selectable initial-position import source.

InstrumentMetadata.description: Serializer for instrument metadata derived from the instrument symbol.

MarketOrder.description: Schema serializer for a single market order response item.

MarketPositionListItem.description: Schema serializer for market position list items.

Money.description: Serializer for a numeric amount paired with its currency code.

OandaAccountDetailResponse.description: Schema serializer for OANDA account responses with cached snapshot fields.

OandaAccountSnapshotRefreshResponse.description: Schema serializer for OANDA account snapshot refresh task status.

api_type.description:
API endpoint type (practice or live)

* `practice` - Practice
* `live` - Live

jurisdiction.description:
Regulatory jurisdiction for this account

* `US` - United States
* `JP` - Japan
* `OTHER` - Other/International

margin_used.description: Margin currently used by open positions

nav.description: Latest cached net asset value from OANDA

open_trade_count.description: Latest cached open trade count from OANDA

open_position_count.description: Latest cached open position count from OANDA

pending_order_count.description: Latest cached pending order count from OANDA

hedging_enabled.description: Latest cached OANDA hedging capability for this account

snapshot_refreshed_at.description: Timestamp when the cached OANDA account snapshot was refreshed

snapshot_refresh_error.description: Last safe error message from refreshing the OANDA account snapshot

snapshot_refresh_task_id.description: Latest manual OANDA account snapshot refresh Celery task ID

snapshot_refresh_status.description:
Latest manual OANDA account snapshot refresh task status

* `idle` - Idle
* `queued` - Queued
* `running` - Running
* `completed` - Completed
* `failed` - Failed

snapshot_refresh_status_updated_at.description: Timestamp when the manual OANDA account snapshot refresh status changed

live_max_exposure_guard_enabled.description: Whether to enforce the maximum estimated gross units check before starting non-dry-run trading tasks on this account

live_max_estimated_exposure_units.description: Account-specific maximum estimated gross units allowed when the live max exposure guard is enabled

live_max_initial_order_guard_enabled.description: Whether to enforce the account-specific maximum initial order units check before starting non-dry-run trading tasks on this account

live_max_initial_order_units.description: Account-specific maximum absolute units allowed for the initial strategy order

live_max_order_guard_enabled.description: Whether to enforce the account-specific maximum order units check before submitting broker-bound orders on this account

live_max_order_units.description: Account-specific maximum absolute units allowed for a single broker-bound order

live_tick_latency_metric_interval_second.description: Minimum interval in seconds for persisting live tick latency metrics. Set to 0 to disable periodic latency metric samples.

is_default.description: Whether this is the default account for market data collection

created_at.description: Timestamp when the account was added

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the account was last updated

api_type.description:
API endpoint type (practice or live)

* `practice` - Practice
* `live` - Live

jurisdiction.description:
Regulatory jurisdiction for this account

* `US` - United States
* `JP` - Japan
* `OTHER` - Other/International

live_max_exposure_guard_enabled.description: Whether to enforce the maximum estimated gross units check before starting non-dry-run trading tasks on this account

live_max_estimated_exposure_units.description: Account-specific maximum estimated gross units allowed when the live max exposure guard is enabled

live_max_initial_order_guard_enabled.description: Whether to enforce the account-specific maximum initial order units check before starting non-dry-run trading tasks on this account

live_max_initial_order_units.description: Account-specific maximum absolute units allowed for the initial strategy order

live_max_order_guard_enabled.description: Whether to enforce the account-specific maximum order units check before submitting broker-bound orders on this account

live_max_order_units.description: Account-specific maximum absolute units allowed for a single broker-bound order

live_tick_latency_metric_interval_second.description: Minimum interval in seconds for persisting live tick latency metrics. Set to 0 to disable periodic latency metric samples.

is_default.description: Whether this is the default account for market data collection

OandaHealthAccount.description: Schema serializer for selected OANDA account metadata.

Order.description: Serializer for order data from Order model.

order_type.description:
Type of order

* `market` - market
* `limit` - limit
* `stop` - stop
* `oco` - oco

PatchedBacktestTaskCreateRequest.description: Serializer for creating and updating BacktestTask.

config.description: Strategy configuration used by this task

data_source.description:
Data source for historical tick data

* `postgresql` - PostgreSQL
* `athena` - AWS Athena
* `s3` - AWS S3

display_currency.description: Preferred currency for displaying balances and PnL. Empty uses account currency.

pip_size.description: Pip size for the instrument (e.g., 0.0001 for EUR_USD, 0.01 for USD_JPY). If not provided, will be fetched from OANDA account.

hedging_enabled.description: Allow simultaneous long and short positions (hedging) during backtest.

tick_granularity.description:
Tick replay granularity for backtests. Use 'tick' for full tick-by-tick replay, or a time bucket such as '1s' or '1m'.

* `tick` - All Ticks
* `1s` - 1 Second
* `10s` - 10 Seconds
* `15s` - 15 Seconds
* `30s` - 30 Seconds
* `1m` - 1 Minute
* `5m` - 5 Minutes
* `15m` - 15 Minutes
* `30m` - 30 Minutes
* `1h` - 1 Hour

tick_window_value_mode.description:
Representative value to use when replay granularity is aggregated. Ignored when tick_granularity='tick'.

* `first` - First Tick
* `last` - Last Tick
* `average` - Average
* `median` - Median

drain_duration_hours.description: Maximum duration in hours for drain-on-stop before forcing a stop. Set to 0 to wait indefinitely for positions to reach breakeven.

market_idle_pre_close_minutes.description: Switch to IDLE this many minutes before the market closes. 0 disables pre-close idling.

market_idle_resume_delay_minutes.description: Wait this many minutes after the market reopens before resuming trading. 0 disables the resume delay.

market_close_enabled.description: Apply a weekly market-close window during the backtest. When disabled, market-idle thresholds are ignored.

market_close_weekday.description: Weekday the market closes (0 = Monday, 6 = Sunday). Default: 4 (Friday).

market_close_hour_utc.description: Hour (UTC) at which the market closes on close weekday. 0–23.

market_open_weekday.description: Weekday the market reopens (0 = Monday, 6 = Sunday). Default: 6 (Sunday).

market_open_hour_utc.description: Hour (UTC) at which the market reopens on open weekday. 0–23.

max_tick_gap_hours.description: Maximum forward gap between replayed ticks, in hours, before the backtest is failed as suspicious. Default: 120 (5 days).

initial_positions_enabled.description: Create Snowball initial cycles/positions before starting the backtest.

initial_position_cycles.description: Requested Snowball initial cycle/position structure. Positions, trades, orders, and strategy state are generated from this data.

sell_on_stop.description: Close all positions when the task is stopped

PatchedStrategyConfigDetailRequest.description: Serializer for strategy configuration full details.

PatchedTradingTaskCreateRequest.description:
Serializer for creating and updating TradingTask.

Accepts config_id and account_id from the frontend, mapping them
to the config and oanda_account FK fields.

display_currency.description: Preferred currency for displaying balances and PnL.

sell_on_stop.description: Close all positions when the task is stopped

dry_run.description: Simulate order execution without placing real orders on OANDA

hedging_enabled.description: Allow simultaneous long and short positions (hedging). Requires a hedging-enabled OANDA account.

initial_positions_enabled.description: Create Snowball initial cycles/positions before starting the trading task.

initial_position_cycles.description: Requested Snowball initial cycle/position structure. Positions, trades, orders, and strategy state are generated from this data.

api_retry_max_attempts.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for OANDA API calls before the task fails. Uses exponential backoff between attempts.

api_retry_backoff_base_seconds.description: Initial delay between OANDA API retries (seconds). Doubled on each attempt.

api_retry_backoff_max_seconds.description: Cap on the backoff delay between retries (seconds).

drain_duration_hours.description: Maximum duration in hours for drain-on-stop before forcing a stop. Set to 0 to wait indefinitely for positions to reach breakeven.

market_idle_pre_close_minutes.description: Switch to IDLE this many minutes before the market closes. 0 disables pre-close idling.

market_idle_resume_delay_minutes.description: Wait this many minutes after the market reopens before resuming trading. 0 disables the resume delay.

live_tick_stale_guard_enabled.description: Fail the task before strategy/order processing when a live tick is older than live_tick_max_age_seconds.

live_tick_max_age_seconds.description: Maximum accepted age in seconds for a live tick before the task fails.

live_tick_status_log_interval_seconds.description: Interval in seconds for periodic live tick delivery status logs. Set to 0 to disable periodic OK logs.

broker_drift_check_interval_seconds.description: Interval in seconds for runtime OANDA/local broker drift checks. Set to 0 to disable runtime drift checks after startup reconciliation.

Position.description: Serializer for position data from Position model.

realized_pnl.description: Return realized PnL for closed positions when available.

realized_pnl_currency.description: Return the currency for realized PnL values.

close_reason.description:
Return close reason derived from the closing trade's execution_method.

Returns ``None`` for open positions, a protection method name for
protection closes, and ``"normal"`` for regular TP/manual closes.

trade_ids.description: Return the IDs of trades linked to this position.

PositionLifecycleEvent.description: Serializer for one point in a position lifecycle timeline.

PositionLifecycleItem.description: Serializer for a position and its lifecycle timeline.

PositionLifecycleResponse.description: Serializer for a complete position lifecycle chain response.

PositionLifecycleSummary.description: Serializer for one position summary within a lifecycle chain.

PositionRequest.description: Serializer for opening a position via a market order.

PublicAccountSettings.description: Serializer for public account settings (no authentication required).

registration_enabled.description: Whether new user registration is enabled

email_whitelist_enabled.description: Whether email whitelist is enforced for registration/login

RecoveryAttempt.description: Serializer for automatic task recovery audit records.

id.description: Unique identifier for this recovery attempt

task_type.description:
Type of task (backtest or trading)

* `backtest` - Backtest
* `trading` - Trading

execution_id.description: Execution run UUID at the time of recovery

ResendVerificationRequest.description: Serializer for resend verification email request.

email.description: Email address to resend verification to

StatusEnum.description:
* `created` - Created
* `starting` - Starting
* `running` - Running
* `paused` - Paused
* `idle` - Idle
* `draining` - Draining
* `stopping` - Stopping
* `stopped` - Stopped
* `completed` - Completed
* `failed` - Failed

StrategyConfigCreateRequest.description:
Serializer for creating and updating strategy configurations.

Includes validation against strategy registry.

StrategyConfigDetail.description: Serializer for strategy configuration full details.

revision.description: Monotonic revision for runtime-affecting configuration changes

config_hash.description: Stable hash of strategy_type and parameters for this revision

is_in_use.description: Get whether configuration is in use by active tasks.

has_running_tasks.description: Get whether this configuration is currently used by a running task.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this record was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when this record was last updated

StrategyConfigList.description: Serializer for strategy configuration list view (summary only).

revision.description: Monotonic revision for runtime-affecting configuration changes

config_hash.description: Stable hash of strategy_type and parameters for this revision

is_in_use.description: Get whether configuration is in use by active tasks.

has_running_tasks.description: Get whether this configuration is currently used by a running task.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this record was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when this record was last updated

TaskExecution.description: Serializer for task execution history rows.

TaskInstrumentContext.description: Serializer for task-level instrument and pip-size diagnostics.

TaskLog.description:
Serializer for TaskLog model.

Provides access to task execution logs with timestamp, level, and message.

id.description: Unique identifier for this log entry

task_type.description:
Type of task (backtest or trading)

* `backtest` - Backtest
* `trading` - Trading

task_id.description: UUID of the task this log entry belongs to

execution_id.description: Execution run UUID (shared with Celery task_id)

timestamp.description: When this log entry was created

level.description:
Log severity level

* `DEBUG` - Debug
* `INFO` - Info
* `WARNING` - Warning
* `ERROR` - Error
* `CRITICAL` - Critical

component.description: Component/logger name that emitted this log

TaskMoneyContext.description: Serializer for task-level money and display-currency context.

TaskSummary.description:
Serializer for structured task summary response.

Returns comprehensive task summary grouped into logical sections:
- timestamp: Common timestamp from the last tick
- pnl: Realized and unrealized PnL
- counts: Trade and position counts
- execution: Balance and ticks processed
- tick: Last tick prices (bid, ask, mid)
- task: Status, timing, and progress

TickDeliveryInfo.description: Serializer for live tick delivery diagnostics.

TickGranularityEnum.description:
* `tick` - All Ticks
* `1s` - 1 Second
* `10s` - 10 Seconds
* `15s` - 15 Seconds
* `30s` - 30 Seconds
* `1m` - 1 Minute
* `5m` - 5 Minutes
* `15m` - 15 Minutes
* `30m` - 30 Minutes
* `1h` - 1 Hour

TickWindowValueModeEnum.description:
* `first` - First Tick
* `last` - Last Tick
* `average` - Average
* `median` - Median

Trade.description: Serializer for trade data from Trades model.

execution_method_display.description: Human-readable display name for the execution method.

stop_loss_price.description: Return stop_loss_price from the related position, if any.

entry_price.description: Position entry price (or average price for netting strategies). Present only on close trades.

event_type_display.description: Human-readable display name for the event type.

execution_id.description: Execution run UUID (shared with Celery task_id)

sell_on_stop.description: Close all positions when the task is stopped

dry_run.description: Simulate order execution without placing real orders on OANDA

hedging_enabled.description: Allow simultaneous long and short positions (hedging). Requires a hedging-enabled OANDA account.

initial_positions_enabled.description: Create Snowball initial cycles/positions before starting the trading task.

initial_position_cycles.description: Requested Snowball initial cycle/position structure. Positions, trades, orders, and strategy state are generated from this data.

pip_size.description: Pip size for the instrument (e.g., 0.0001 for EUR_USD, 0.01 for USD_JPY). If not provided, will be fetched from OANDA account.

status.description:
Current task status

* `created` - Created
* `starting` - Starting
* `running` - Running
* `paused` - Paused
* `idle` - Idle
* `draining` - Draining
* `stopping` - Stopping
* `stopped` - Stopped
* `completed` - Completed
* `failed` - Failed

execution_id.description: UUID identifying the current execution run

started_at.description: Timestamp when the task execution started

completed_at.description: Timestamp when the task execution completed

error_message.description: Return a fixed public failure message without internal details.

error_code.description: Return the stable public failure code.

api_retry_max_attempts.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for OANDA API calls before the task fails. Uses exponential backoff between attempts.

api_retry_backoff_base_seconds.description: Initial delay between OANDA API retries (seconds). Doubled on each attempt.

api_retry_backoff_max_seconds.description: Cap on the backoff delay between retries (seconds).

drain_duration_hours.description: Maximum duration in hours for drain-on-stop before forcing a stop. Set to 0 to wait indefinitely for positions to reach breakeven.

market_idle_pre_close_minutes.description: Switch to IDLE this many minutes before the market closes. 0 disables pre-close idling.

market_idle_resume_delay_minutes.description: Wait this many minutes after the market reopens before resuming trading. 0 disables the resume delay.

live_tick_stale_guard_enabled.description: Fail the task before strategy/order processing when a live tick is older than live_tick_max_age_seconds.

live_tick_max_age_seconds.description: Maximum accepted age in seconds for a live tick before the task fails.

live_tick_status_log_interval_seconds.description: Interval in seconds for periodic live tick delivery status logs. Set to 0 to disable periodic OK logs.

broker_drift_check_interval_seconds.description: Interval in seconds for runtime OANDA/local broker drift checks. Set to 0 to disable runtime drift checks after startup reconciliation.

has_strategy_state.description: Check if task has saved strategy state.

can_resume.description: Check if task can be resumed with state recovery.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this record was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when this record was last updated

UserProfile.description: Serializer for user profile including timezone and language preferences.

username.description: Username (auto-generated from email if not provided)

is_staff.title: Staff status
is_staff.description: Designates whether the user can log into this admin site.

is_superuser.title: Superuser status
is_superuser.description: Designates that this user has all permissions without explicitly assigning them.

email_verified.description: Whether the user's email address has been verified

username.description: Username (auto-generated from email if not provided)

password.description: Password must be at least 8 characters long

updated_at.description: Timestamp when settings were last updated
